label: Inventory Service
description: Internal microservice responsible for tracking product stock levels. Called synchronously during order creation to verify availability.

calls.label: POST /inventory/check — batch stock check for all line items
calls.purpose: Verify that every line item in the order is in stock at the requested quantity before creating the order

reliability.fallback: Return 409 Conflict — cannot create an order without confirming stock availability

label: Payment Service
description: Internal microservice wrapping the Stripe API. Called synchronously during order creation to create a PaymentIntent. Payment outcomes are received asynchronously via Kafka events.

calls.label: POST /payments/intents — create Stripe PaymentIntent for order total
calls.purpose: Create a Stripe PaymentIntent before persisting the order. The PaymentIntent client_secret is returned to the customer for client-side payment confirmation.

reliability.fallback: Return 503 Service Unavailable — cannot create order without a payment intent

label: Orders PostgreSQL
description: Primary data store for all order records. Stores the full order entity including lineItems snapshot, status, payment intent reference, and fulfilment details.

calls.label: INSERT orders — persist new order record
calls.purpose: Write the validated order to the database with AWAITING_PAYMENT status

calls.label: SELECT orders WHERE id — fetch order by ID
calls.purpose: Retrieve order for status validation and event processing

calls.label: UPDATE orders SET status — update order state
calls.purpose: Transition order to new status on payment events

reliability.fallback: Return 500 — cannot operate without primary data store

label: Kafka Producer
description: Kafka producer for publishing order lifecycle domain events. Uses the transactional outbox pattern — events are written to the database outbox table in the same transaction as the domain operation, then published by a background worker.

calls.label: Publish order.created to order-events topic
calls.purpose: Notify downstream services (inventory reservation, notifications) that a new order has been placed

calls.label: Publish order.confirmed to order-events topic
calls.purpose: Notify downstream services (fulfilment, notifications) that payment has been confirmed

calls.label: Publish order.cancelled to order-events topic
calls.purpose: Notify downstream services (inventory release, notifications) that an order has been cancelled due to payment failure

reliability.fallback: Events are durably stored in the outbox table. Background worker retries until successfully published.

label: Redis — Session & Rate Limit
description: Redis instance used for per-user order rate limit sliding window counters. Also used for short-lived session caching.

calls.label: INCR + EXPIRE ratelimit:{userId}:{window} — increment and check rate limit counter
calls.purpose: Enforce the 5-orders-per-24h per-user rate limit using a Redis sliding window counter

calls.label: DECR ratelimit:{userId}:{window} — decrement rate limit counter on payment failure
calls.purpose: Restore one order quota slot to the user when their payment fails — a failed payment should not count against their daily quota

reliability.fallback: On cache unavailability: allow the request to proceed for rate limit checks (fail-open). On decrement failure: accept the data inconsistency — counter expires naturally within 24h.
